rows.requirement: Standalone v6 mock opens as a dense MS Project-like planning surface with Russian UI and no console errors.
rows.cleanup: Mock state is isolated in localStorage key kisspm-gantt-mock-v6-state and reset by verifier before scenario execution.

rows.requirement: Excel-like grid supports active cell, formula bar, F2 edit, typing, Enter, undo/redo, blank-row create, Insert/Delete, column hide/show, and resize.
rows.cleanup: Verifier reloads from a cleared v6 localStorage state before interaction checks.

rows.requirement: BR2/Gun Gantt-inspired QoL is present: dropdown editors, resource/task/predecessor/date autocomplete, command suggestions, field hints, and tooltips.
rows.cleanup: Autocomplete/dropdown changes are mock-local and included in the same localStorage reset boundary.

rows.requirement: Scheduling mock demonstrates MS Project-style recalculation for Duration/Work/Units and updates the Gantt projection.
rows.cleanup: No backend state; verifier resets the mock session.

rows.requirement: Gantt timeline supports Tracking Gantt baseline, splitter resize, bar drag, task/table sync, status marker, dependencies, milestone, and critical bars.
rows.cleanup: Timeline edits are mock-local and verifier resets localStorage between relevant checks.

rows.requirement: Resource conflict workspace shows conflicts, heatmap, recommended action, dry-run preview, apply, audit/readback, and return-to-Gantt projection update.
rows.cleanup: Verifier proves reload persistence after apply; reset remains localStorage-only.

rows.requirement: Sliding management panel remains integrated with selected task/conflict and separates normal edits from governed preview/apply decisions.
rows.cleanup: Panel open/closed state is DOM-only in the verifier scenario.

rows.requirement: Visual QA screenshots exist for desktop initial state, desktop after apply, and narrower viewport with no primary missing controls.
